title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password by clicking 'Forgot Password' on the login page and following the instructions sent to their email.

title: Contact Support
content: Users can contact customer support through the help center or by sending an email to support@example.com.

title: Update Profile
content: Users can update their profile information from the profile settings page after logging into their account.

title: Account Creation
content: New users can create an account by clicking the Sign Up button and completing the registration form.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can delete their account permanently from the account settings page.
